second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.desc:
You have a limited well of physical and mental stamina that you can draw on. As a Bonus Action, you can use it to regain Hit Points equal to 1d10 plus your Fighter level.
You can use this feature twice. You regain one expended use when you finish a Short Rest, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.
When you reach certain Fighter levels, you gain more uses of this feature, as shown in the Second Wind column of the Fighter Features table.

fighting_style.name: Fighting Style
fighting_style.desc:
You have honed your martial prowess and gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice. Defense is recommended.
Whenever you gain a Fighter level, you can replace the feat you chose with a different Fighting Style feat.

weapon_mastery.name: Weapon Mastery
weapon_mastery.desc:
Your training with weapons allows you to use the mastery properties of three kinds of Simple or Martial weapons of your choice. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can practice weapon drills and change one of those weapon choices.
When you reach certain Fighter levels, you gain the ability to use the mastery properties of more kinds of weapons, as shown in the Weapon Mastery column of the Fighter Features table.

action_surge.name: Action Surge
action_surge.desc:
You can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action, except the Magic action.
 Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. Starting at level 17, you can use it twice before a rest but only once on a turn.

tactical_mind.name: Tactical Mind
tactical_mind.desc: You have a mind for tactics on and off the battlefield. When you fail an ability check, you can expend a use of your Second Wind to push yourself toward success. Rather than regaining Hit Points, you roll 1d10 and add the number rolled to the ability check, potentially turning it into a success. If the check still fails, this use of Second Wind isn't expended.

darkvision_60.name: Darkvision
darkvision_60.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

keen_senses.name: Keen Senses
keen_senses.desc: Your otherworldly senses are sharp. You have especially perceptive awareness of the world around you.

fey_ancestry.name: Fey Ancestry
fey_ancestry.desc: You have fey magic in your bloodline, granting you resilience against effects that would cloud your mind or put you to sleep.

trance.name: Trance
trance.desc: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend them in a meditative trance.

resourceful.name: Resourceful
resourceful.desc: You quickly adapt to new challenges and draw on a wide range of practical experience.

skillful.name: Skillful
skillful.desc: You show broad talent and pick up expertise with ease, reflecting humanity's versatility.

versatile.name: Versatile
versatile.desc: You are capable of turning your efforts toward many pursuits, whether martial, scholarly, or social.

fighter_subclass.name: Fighter Subclass
fighter_subclass.desc: You gain a fighter subclass (Martial Archetype) that grants additional features at higher levels.
